auto:en.Empowering communities through accessibl: Empowering communities through accessible, comprehensive resource discovery
auto:en.Community Compass aims to help people wh: Community Compass aims to help people when things get tough. Help shows up in many forms, often through groups working tirelessly nearby. This space exists because getting assistance should not be as hard as it is. Sometimes a bit of clarity makes all the difference. A fresh start can come from clear answers. Communities grow stronger by knowing where to look.
auto:en.A place takes shape when people find wha: A place takes shape when people find what they need without getting lost. This website builds a single hub that brings together all resources into one place for people in need. One goal drives it: making access straightforward for everyone. Support shows up through community resources linking to options close by. Find what help exists nearby through current details on local support services.
auto:en.Folks move through life in their own way: Folks move through life in their own way, so we listen first. How someone feels matters just as much as what they say.
auto:en.Together, people find a deeper kind of s: Together, people find a deeper kind of strength. Support grows when individuals show up for each other.
auto:en.Access to essential resources shouldn't: Access to essential resources shouldn't depend on luck. We are focused on getting these tools into the hands of everyone in need.
auto:en.Help us expand our directory by submitti: Help us expand our directory by submitting resources, sharing feedback, or getting involved in your community.
auto:en.Connecting communities with the resource: Connecting communities with the resources they need. Your guide to local support services.

auto:en.Hi! I'm your Community Compass helper. H: Hi! I'm your Community Compass helper. How can I assist you today? You can ask me about finding resources, using the map, or getting help with any feature!
auto:en.How do I search for resources effectivel: How do I search for resources effectively?
auto:en.What types of resources can I find?: What types of resources can I find?
auto:en.You can search for resources in several:
You can search for resources in several ways:

• **Keyword Search**: Use the search bar to find specific resources by name, description, or tags
• **Category Filters**: Select multiple categories to filter results (you can choose more than one!)
• **Location Filter**: Toggle between local resources (within ~200 miles) or all resources
• **Favorites**: Save frequently used resources for quick access

Pro tip: Try combining search terms with category filters for the best results!
auto:en.Community Compass includes these resourc:
Community Compass includes these resource categories:

• **Food Assistance** - Food banks, meal programs, nutrition help
• **Healthcare** - Clinics, medical services, health programs
• **Housing** - Shelter, rental assistance, housing support
• **Employment** - Job training, career services, employment help
• **Education** - Tutoring, GED programs, educational resources
• **Senior Services** - Programs for older adults
• **Mental Health** - Counseling, therapy, mental health support
• **Legal Aid** - Legal assistance, court help
• **Transportation** - Ride services, transit help
• **Child Care** - Daycare, after-school programs
• **Veterans Services** - Programs for veterans
• **Financial Assistance** - Money help, financial aid

Select multiple categories in the filter to see all relevant resources!
auto:en.The interactive map helps you visualize:
The interactive map helps you visualize resource locations:

• **Map View**: See all resources plotted on an interactive map
• **Density View**: Toggle heatmap to see resource concentration
• **Local Filter**: Focus on resources within ~200 miles
• **Click Resources**: Select any map pin to see detailed information
• **Zoom & Pan**: Navigate the map to explore different areas

The map is especially helpful for planning visits to multiple resources!
auto:en.Favorites help you keep track of useful:
Favorites help you keep track of useful resources:

• **Save Resources**: Click the heart icon on any resource to save it
• **Quick Access**: Your favorites appear in a special filtered view
• **Sync Across Devices**: Favorites are tied to your account
• **Remove Favorites**: Click the heart again to remove from favorites

Perfect for resources you use regularly or want to remember!
auto:en.Know a resource that should be listed? S:
Know a resource that should be listed? Submit it!

• **Add Resource**: Use the "Add Resource" page to submit new listings
• **Review Process**: All submissions are reviewed before being published
• **Required Info**: Include contact details, services offered, and location
• **Help Community**: Your submissions help others find needed resources

We appreciate community contributions to keep our database comprehensive!
auto:en.I can help you with:\n\n• 🔍 Finding and:
I can help you with:

• 🔍 Finding and searching resources
• 📍 Using the interactive map
• ❤️ Managing favorites
• 📝 Submitting new resources
• 🎯 Understanding different categories
• 🚀 Taking a guided tour

Try asking me about any of these topics, or click one of the quick action buttons above!
auto:en.Let us show you around to help you find: Let us show you around to help you find the resources you need. This quick tour will take just a minute.
auto:en.Search and filter through hundreds of co: Search and filter through hundreds of community resources. Use the search bar for keyword matching or pick categories to narrow results.
auto:en.Our AI understands natural language. To: Our AI understands natural language. To use it, simply type what you need (like 'help with rent') and THEN press the AI button!
auto:en.Manage your journey here! Access your sa: Manage your journey here! Access your saved favorites with the heart icon, or view and edit your own contributions with the profile icon. You have full control to update or delete your submissions anytime!
auto:en.Instantly translate everything! Our AI t: Instantly translate everything! Our AI translates search results, descriptions, and helper messages into your preferred language.
auto:en.Visualize resources near you. Switch to: Visualize resources near you. Switch to 'Density View' to see where support is most concentrated in your community.
auto:en.Know of a service that could help others: Know of a service that could help others? Add it to our directory here! You can submit details, photos, and locations to help your neighbors find what they need.
auto:en.If you ever get lost, our Community Help: If you ever get lost, our Community Helper is here 24/7 to answer questions and guide you to the right services.
auto:en.You're ready to explore. Find the help y: You're ready to explore. Find the help you need and connect with your community!
